results.title: Wallabies playmaker Carter Gordon ruled out of next two Tests
Eala leaving with ‘so many positives’ after breakthrough Wimbledon run
results.description: Alex Eala said she was leaving with "so many positives" after Jasmine Paolini ended the Philippine tennis sensation's history-making Wimbledon run.

results.title: Last-gasp Merino strike gives Spain 1-0 win over Portugal in World Cup last 16
results.description: ARLINGTON, Texas- - Spain substitute Mikel Merino broke through a stubborn Portugal defence in the 91st minute to earn his side a 1-0 win on Monday to take the former champions into the quarter-finals and bring the curtain down on Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career.

results.title: Everything Mauricio Pochettino Said After USMNT's World Cup Elimination vs. Belgium
results.description: The United States' World Cup run is over after losing to Belgium in the Round of 16.

results.title: Belgium Dominates U.S. 4-1 To Reach World Cup Quarterfinals After Days Of Controversy
results.description: Seeking its first World Cup title, Belgium knocked the U.S. out in the round of 16 for the second time in 12 years and extended its unbeaten streak to 18 games.

results.title: A’s Release Michael Kelly
results.description: The Athletics released reliever Michael Kelly over the weekend, according to the MLB.com transaction log. He was designated for assignment a week earlier when the A’s needed a 40-man roster spot to promote rookie infielder Joshua Kuroda-Grauer.

results.title: Spain win it late to give Ronaldo bitter end to World Cup career
results.description: There was a sombre moment shortly before kickoff when a black-and-white image of the late Portugal forward Diogo Jota flashed up on the giant screen that looms over the field.

results.title: Belgium send USA out of World Cup with big win after Trump controversy
results.description: The United States’ hopes for a deep World Cup run at home ended in Seattle.

results.title: Meet Obelgix, the Belgian superfan following his team's World Cup journey across America
results.description: He smuggled a chicken into a stadium and became a soccer icon. Now he's touring America with his family, hoping Belgium knocks out the U.S.
